\tzpentry{ID3573}{Zeta-Regularized Zeta Function Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3573 introduces Zeta-Regularized Zeta Function Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \boxed{\frac{\partial \zeta}{\partial t} + J(\Psi,\zeta+f) \;=\; \nu\nabla^2_{\!s}\zeta + F(\theta,\lambda,t)} \]
